journal_entry.description: Acquisition of land with building for factory construction, financed by instalment note
journal_entry.rationale: Under IFRS, the land is recorded at the present value of the instalment payments. The stated purchase price is $60,000,000 payable in 6 annual instalments of $10,000,000 at 6% market rate. Present value = $10,000,000 × 4.9173 (PV annuity factor, 6%, 6 periods) = $49,173,000. The existing building to be demolished has no separate value as it will be removed immediately; all cost is attributed to land. A long-term liability is recognized for the present value of the instalment obligation.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Land acquired with deferred payment terms is recorded at present value of future instalments ($49,173,000). The existing building has no separate value as it will be demolished immediately, so all cost is attributed to land. One asset increase (land), one liability increase (notes payable).
